products.name: REDDY PREMIUM Fresh Milk – Pasteurised & Homogenised (500ml)

reviews.comment: Tastes very fresh. Great for daily use.

faq.a: Yes, we recommend boiling before consumption for safety.

faq.a: No, 100% pure raw milk without any preservatives.

reviews.comment: Sweet and fruity flavor, loved it!

products.name: REDDY PREMIUM Milk Powder – Spray Dried (500g)
products.description: High-quality spray-dried whole milk powder. Retains natural dairy flavor and full nutrition. Dissolves easily to prepare milk, tea, coffee, and traditional sweets.

products.storage: Store in cool dry place. Keep in airtight container after opening.

reviews.comment: Dissolves easily without lumps. Makes thick tea.

faq.q: Can I use this for baking?
faq.a: Yes, it is ideal for baking, kheer, sweets, and daily milk preparation.

products.name: REDDY PREMIUM Khova – Pure & Traditional (200g)

reviews.comment: Tastes pure and homemade. Used for delicious Gulab Jamuns.

blogs.title: Why A2 Cow Milk is Better for Your Digestive System
blogs.summary: Discover the health differences between A1 and A2 proteins and how switching to A2 milk can alleviate bloating and discomfort.
blogs.content: A2 Cow Milk is milk that contains only the A2 type of beta-casein protein, rather than the more common A1 protein found in regular store-bought milk. For decades, traditional Indian breeds of cows (like Gir, Sahiwal, and Ongole) have naturally produced 100% A2 milk. Recent research demonstrates that A2 beta-casein is processed differently by our digestive enzymes, preventing the release of BCM-7 (Beta-casomorphin-7), which has been linked to bloating, stomach cramps, and inflammatory reactions. Swapping your daily milk for Reddy Premium A2 Cow Milk ensures not only pure farm-fresh flavor but also comfortable digestion and superior calcium absorption.

blogs.title: Perfect Soft Paneer Tikka Recipe for Family Evenings
blogs.summary: An easy step-by-step recipe to get restaurant-style soft Paneer Tikka using Reddy Fresh Malai Paneer at home.
blogs.content: To prepare perfect soft Paneer Tikka, the secret lies in the moisture of the Paneer and the consistency of the marinade. Step 1: Take 200g of Reddy Fresh Malai Paneer and cut into thick cubes. Step 2: Soak the cubes in lukewarm water for 10 minutes, then pat dry. Step 3: Mix hung curd with mustard oil, Kashmiri red chilli powder, ginger-garlic paste, garam masala, and kasuri methi. Step 4: Gently fold the paneer cubes, diced onions, and bell peppers into the paste. Step 5: Roast in a hot oven or grill pan for 12-15 minutes until charred at the edges. Garnish with lemon juice and serve with mint chutney!
